CreateDataset.description: Grants permission to create a dataset

CreateInferenceScheduler.description: Grants permission to create an inference scheduler for a trained model

CreateLabel.description: Grants permission to create a label

CreateLabelGroup.description: Grants permission to create a label group

CreateModel.description: Grants permission to create a model that is trained on a dataset

CreateRetrainingScheduler.description: Grants permission to create a retraining scheduler for a trained model

DeleteDataset.description: Grants permission to delete a dataset

DeleteInferenceScheduler.description: Grants permission to delete an inference scheduler

DeleteLabel.description: Grants permission to delete a label

DeleteLabelGroup.description: Grants permission to delete a label group

DeleteModel.description: Grants permission to delete a model

DeleteResourcePolicy.description: Grants permission to delete a resource policy

DeleteRetrainingScheduler.description: Grants permission to delete a retraining scheduler of a trained model

DescribeDataIngestionJob.description: Grants permission to describe a data ingestion job

DescribeDataset.description: Grants permission to describe a dataset

DescribeInferenceScheduler.description: Grants permission to describe an inference scheduler

DescribeLabelGroup.description: Grants permission to describe a label group

DescribeModel.description: Grants permission to describe a model

DescribeModelVersion.description: Grants permission to describe a model version

DescribeResourcePolicy.description: Grants permission to describe a resource policy

DescribeRetrainingScheduler.description: Grants permission to describe a retraining scheduler of a trained model

Describelabel.description: Grants permission to describe a label

ImportDataset.description: Grants permission to import a dataset

ImportModelVersion.description: Grants permission to import a model version

ListDataIngestionJobs.description: Grants permission to list the data ingestion jobs in your account or for a particular dataset

ListDatasets.description: Grants permission to list the datasets in your account

ListInferenceEvents.description: Grants permission to list the inference events for an inference scheduler

ListInferenceExecutions.description: Grants permission to list the inference executions for an inference scheduler

ListInferenceSchedulers.description: Grants permission to list the inference schedulers in your account

ListLabelGroups.description: Grants permission to list the label groups in your account

ListLabels.description: Grants permission to list the labels in your account

ListModelVersions.description: Grants permission to list the model versions in your account

ListModels.description: Grants permission to list the models in your account

ListRetrainingSchedulers.description: Grants permission to list the retraining schedulers in your account

ListSensorStatistics.description: Grants permission to list the sensor statistics for a particular dataset or an ingestion job

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list the tags for a resource

PutResourcePolicy.description: Grants permission to put a resource policy

StartDataIngestionJob.description: Grants permission to start a data ingestion job for a dataset

StartInferenceScheduler.description: Grants permission to start an inference scheduler

StartRetrainingScheduler.description: Grants permission to start a retraining scheduler of a trained model

StopInferenceScheduler.description: Grants permission to stop an inference scheduler

StopRetrainingScheduler.description: Grants permission to stop a retraining scheduler of a trained model

TagResource.description: Grants permission to tag a resource

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to untag a resource

UpdateActiveModelVersion.description: Grants permission to set the active model version for a given machine learning model

UpdateInferenceScheduler.description: Grants permission to update an inference scheduler

UpdateLabelGroup.description: Grants permission to update a label group

UpdateModel.description: Grants permission to update a trained model

UpdateRetrainingScheduler.description: Grants permission to update a retraining scheduler of a trained model

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the presence of tag key-value pairs in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by tag key-value pairs attached to the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the presence of tag keys in the request

lookoutequipment:IsImportingData.description: Filters access by the import strategy of underlying data
